channel.title: React on Niranjan Liyanage
channel.description: Recent content in React on Niranjan Liyanage

item.title: WorkspaceLens – Outdoor Knowledge Work Photo Collection & Analysis
item.description: WorkspaceLens is a AI-powered mobile-first Progressive Web Application (PWA) that implements the pOKW2 photo analysis model (Herneoja et al., 2023) for collecting and analysing self-reported photographs from outdoor and semi-outdoor knowledge work environments.

item.title: WorkspaceLens – Outdoor Knowledge Work Photo Collection & Analysis
Smart Adaptive Interfaces – AI-Powered Digital Wellbeing
item.description: A browser-based tool that uses Large Language Models to modify web content in real-time, helping users combat digital distractions and dark patterns through adaptive interfaces. Nominated for demonstration at Academic MindTrek 2025 in Tampere, Finland.
